## B. Requirements Consistency Briefing (需求一致性简报)

<!-- Data source: Feature Design doc §4 (SRS Requirement) + §3 (Interface Contract) + §7 (Test Inventory) -->
<!-- For each srs_trace requirement ID, copy EARS statement + Given/When/Then ACs from §4, then map to implementation and tests -->

### {FR-xxx}: {EARS statement summary}

**Acceptance Criteria:**

| AC | Description | Implementing Methods | Verifying Tests | Verdict |
|----|-------------|---------------------|-----------------|---------|
| AC-1 | {Given/When/Then from SRS} | {Interface Contract method(s)} | {Test Inventory row ID(s)} | Covered / Partial / Gap |
| AC-2 | {Given/When/Then from SRS} | {Interface Contract method(s)} | {Test Inventory row ID(s)} | Covered / Partial / Gap |

<!-- Repeat for each srs_trace requirement -->

**Overall Consistency Score: N/N ACs fully covered**

> Verdict definitions:
> - **Covered**: test exists, passes, and directly verifies the AC
> - **Partial**: test exists but edge cases or negative paths not fully covered
> - **Gap**: no direct test maps to this AC (requires follow-up)

## E. Risk Assessment with Mitigations (风险与解决办法)

<!-- Data source: Risks merged from Step 8 (Quality) + Step 9 (Feature-ST) -->

| # | Risk | Severity | Mitigation | Status |
|---|------|----------|------------|--------|
| 1 | ⚠ [Mutant] {file}:{line} — {description} | Minor | {e.g., "Add assertion for boundary value X in test_Y" or "Accept: equivalent mutant"} | Resolved / Accepted / Deferred |
| 2 | ⚠ [Coverage] {metric} {N}% — {description} | Major | {e.g., "Add test case for uncovered branch at file:line"} | Resolved / Accepted / Deferred |
| 3 | ⚠ [Dependency] {lib}=={ver} — {description} | Major | {e.g., "Pin to X.Y.Z; schedule upgrade before EOL"} | Resolved / Accepted / Deferred |

> Severity guide: `[Mutant]` → Minor, `[Coverage]` thin margin → Major, `[Dependency]` → Major, Feature-ST issue → per issue severity
>
> If no risks: "No risks identified — all quality gates passed with comfortable margins."
